kernel_subject: PM: core: Add new *_PM_OPS macros, deprecate old ones
stage1_reason: Direct replacement of deprecated SET_NOIRQ_SYSTEM_SLEEP_PM_OPS macro with new NOIRQ_SYSTEM_SLEEP_PM_OPS macro as referenced in commit body linking to kernel change 1a3c7bb08826
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly references kernel commit 1a3c7bb08826 in its body, showing direct dependency for macro replacement from SET_NOIRQ_SYSTEM_SLEEP_PM_OPS to NOIRQ_SYSTEM_SLEEP_PM_OPS.
